calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Scharre for and with Robert McMillan.

Ms. Scharre stated that most accountants are not willing to elect without a court order, that at all times petitioner and decedent believed that this was community property, that both properties were purchased prior to 1985 and that an oral agreement is permitted. The petition for spousal property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
